hero.headline: Preserving memories that matter.
hero.subheadline: AI-powered platform transforming how we remember loved ones. Physical memory keys, voice avatars, and digital testaments for the $130B death care industry.

product.title: The Platform
product.subtitle: A complete ecosystem for preserving and experiencing digital legacy
product.memory_key_desc: Premium QR-enabled device linking the physical and digital worlds. Placed on memorials, urns, or kept as personal keepsakes. One scan opens a living memory.
product.ai_avatar_desc: Conversational AI recreating the voice and personality of loved ones. Built on RAG architecture ensuring responses stay faithful to real memories, never hallucinated.
product.family_council_desc: Multi-stakeholder governance for digital legacy. Family members collaboratively manage, curate, and protect shared memories with granular access controls.
product.testament_desc: Legally-informed digital will for your online presence. Define what happens to your memories, accounts, and digital assets after you're gone.

avatar_section.title: Talk to Those Who Matter
avatar_section.subtitle: AI voice avatars that preserve the essence of conversation. Every interaction grounded in real memories.

projects.title: What We're Building
projects.subtitle: Multiple revenue streams across B2B2C, B2G, and VIP segments
projects.b2b2c_desc: White-label integration with funeral homes. 20% revenue share model. Already signed 14 LOI with funeral home partners across Poland.
projects.b2g_desc: Partnerships with municipalities for cultural heritage preservation. 4 B2G LOIs signed, including the Promenade of Stars in Miedzyzdroje — digitizing 200+ celebrity memorials.
projects.vip_desc: Celebrity and public figure partnerships. First confirmed ambassador: Orina Krajewska, actress and daughter of legendary Malgorzata Braunek. More VIPs in advanced talks.
projects.prototype_desc: Full-stack AI prototype built and operational. RAG-based conversation engine, voice synthesis, and physical key integration demonstrated to investors and partners.

team.title: The Founders
team.subtitle: Experienced operators and builders with deep domain expertise
team.greg_bio: Ex-CTO & Co-COO of Simteract S.A. (public company, 2x €12M revenue, 70+ employees). Built and sold Coddee via M&A. Deep expertise in AI/ML, SaaS platforms, and Big Data. Architect of Aurora Memories' product and go-to-market strategy.
team.wojciech_bio: Founder of ENSO Inc. — a venture-backed next-generation programming language company. World-class technical architect specializing in AI/ML infrastructure, systems design, and platform engineering.
team.gosia_bio: Extensive experience in finance and tax advisory across PL/DACH markets. Expert in large-scale project management, operations, regulatory compliance (GDPR, AI Act, IP), and strategic financial planning.
team.andrzej_bio: 26 years in Polish media industry (Discovery, major TV shows). Member of the Polish Filmmakers Association. Achieved 90% LOI conversion rate. Drives the VIP program, church partnerships, and strategic media relationships.

cta.title: Join the Round
cta.subtitle: We're raising on a YC SAFE with 20% discount. Limited allocation in current tranche.
